messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0023",
  "title": "技术驱动： AI赋能的全链路增效",
  "page_index": 17,
  "page_range": "17"
}

Section text:
技术驱动： AI赋能的全链路增效  
AI不再仅是辅助工具，而是发行效率的底座。 NEOCRAFT 主张将 AI深度嵌入全链路：     
•营销侧： 通过AIGC技术实现素材工业化，并将爆款素材的吸量看点反哺至游戏本体（如创角优化），实现“广告即内容”的体验闭环。     
•运营侧 ：依托如“鹰眼（ AdEagleEye ）”等监控系统，实现短期实时监控与长期收益预测的结合，利用 AI算法最大化投放 ROI。
NEOCRAFT 始终坚持“数据驱动”与“技术驱动”双轮并行，旨在通过 AI赋能与精品化运营，为全球玩家提供更高品质的游戏体验，助力合作伙伴在复杂的海外市
场中实现商业与口碑的双重成功。

message.content:
**Topics:** AI-driven efficiency in game publishing, full-link AI integration, marketing and operations optimization, dual-drive strategy (data + technology).
**Entities:** NEOCRAFT, AIGC, AdEagleEye (鹰眼监控系统), ROI.
**Claims & Definitions:** AI serves as the foundational infrastructure for publishing efficiency rather than a supplementary tool. The "ad-as-content" model establishes a closed loop where marketing performance data directly informs game development (e.g., character creation optimization). NEOCRAFT's core strategy relies on parallel "data-driven" and "technology-driven" approaches.
**Procedures & Methods:** 
- *Marketing:* Industrializes creative asset production via AIGC; extracts high-conversion hooks from viral ads and feeds them back into game design iterations.
- *Operations:* Deploys monitoring systems (e.g., AdEagleEye) to combine short-term real-time tracking with long-term revenue forecasting; applies AI algorithms to optimize ad spend and maximize ROI.
**Metrics:** ROI (Return on Investment) optimization.
**Evidence & Content Types:** Strategic framework statements, operational workflow descriptions, proprietary system/tool references. No empirical data, case studies, or external citations are provided.
**Dates, Tables & Figures:** None present in this section.

response_text:
**Topics:** AI-driven efficiency in game publishing, full-link AI integration, marketing and operations optimization, dual-drive strategy (data + technology).
**Entities:** NEOCRAFT, AIGC, AdEagleEye (鹰眼监控系统), ROI.
**Claims & Definitions:** AI serves as the foundational infrastructure for publishing efficiency rather than a supplementary tool. The "ad-as-content" model establishes a closed loop where marketing performance data directly informs game development (e.g., character creation optimization). NEOCRAFT's core strategy relies on parallel "data-driven" and "technology-driven" approaches.
**Procedures & Methods:** 
- *Marketing:* Industrializes creative asset production via AIGC; extracts high-conversion hooks from viral ads and feeds them back into game design iterations.
- *Operations:* Deploys monitoring systems (e.g., AdEagleEye) to combine short-term real-time tracking with long-term revenue forecasting; applies AI algorithms to optimize ad spend and maximize ROI.
**Metrics:** ROI (Return on Investment) optimization.
**Evidence & Content Types:** Strategic framework statements, operational workflow descriptions, proprietary system/tool references. No empirical data, case studies, or external citations are provided.
**Dates, Tables & Figures:** None present in this section.
